mapper.select: select NFD.CD_GROUP_ID1 ,NFD.CD_GROUP_ID2 ,NFD.DOC_CONTENT ,NCD.DTL_CD_NM AS FORM_NM FROM NMCP_FORM_DTL NFD , NMCP_CD_DTL NCD , ( SELECT CD_GROUP_ID1, CD_GROUP_ID2, MAX(DOC_VER) AS DOC_VER FROM NMCP_FORM_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID1 = #{cdGroupId1} AND CD_GROUP_ID2 = #{cdGroupId2} AND USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY CD_GROUP_ID1,CD_GROUP_ID2 ) NFDM WHERE NFD.CD_GROUP_ID1 = NFDM.CD_GROUP_ID1 AND NFD.CD_GROUP_ID2 = NCD.DTL_CD AND NFD.CD_GROUP_ID2 = NFDM.CD_GROUP_ID2 AND NFD.DOC_VER = NFDM.DOC_VER AND NFD.CD_GROUP_ID1 = #{cdGroupId1} AND NFD.CD_GROUP_ID2 = #{cdGroupId2} AND NFD.USE_YN = 'Y'
